name: 内格夫 | 大嘴巴
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been custom painted with a monstrous design and then distressed. Get back here, I'm talking to you!
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器使用怪兽的设计图案进行了自定义涂装，然后加以磨损。 快回来，我说的就是你！
